english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

Woe to the defrauders, who use short measures,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: الَّذِينَ إِذَا اكْتَالُوا عَلَى النَّاسِ يَسْتَوْفُونَ
english translation text:
who, when they measure [a commodity bought] from the people, take the full measure,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

but diminish when they measure or weigh for them.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

Do they not know that they will be resurrected
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

on a tremendous day,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

a day when mankind will stand before the Lord of all the worlds?
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ الْفُجَّارِ لَفِي سِجِّينٍ
english translation text:
Indeed, the record of the vicious is in Sijjeen.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

And what will show you what is Sijjeen?
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

It is a written record.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

Woe to the deniers on that day,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

who deny the Day of Retribution;
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: وَمَا يُكَذِّبُ بِهِ إِلَّا كُلُّ مُعْتَدٍ أَثِيمٍ
english translation text:
and none denies it except every sinful transgressor.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: إِذَا تُتْلَىٰ عَلَيْهِ آيَاتُنَا قَالَ أَسَاطِيرُ الْأَوَّلِينَ
english translation text:
When Our signs are recited to him, he says, ‘Myths of the ancients!’
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: كَلَّا ۖ بَلْ ۜ رَانَ عَلَىٰ قُلُوبِهِم مَّا كَانُوا يَكْسِبُونَ
english translation text:
No, that is not the case! Rather, their hearts have been sullied by what they have been earning.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: كَلَّا إِنَّهُمْ عَن رَّبِّهِمْ يَوْمَئِذٍ لَّمَحْجُوبُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed, they will be alienated from their Lord on that day.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

Afterward they will enter hell,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: ثُمَّ يُقَالُ هَٰذَا الَّذِي كُنتُم بِهِ تُكَذِّبُونَ
english translation text:
then told, ‘This is what you used to deny!’
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: كَلَّا إِنَّ كِتَابَ الْأَبْرَارِ لَفِي عِلِّيِّينَ
english translation text:
Indeed, the record of the pious is in Illeeyun.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

And what will show you what is Illeeyun?
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

It is a written record,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

witnessed by those brought near [to Allah].
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

The pious shall be amid bliss,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

observing, [as they recline] on couches.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

You will perceive in their faces the freshness of bliss.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

They will be served with a sealed pure wine,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: خِتَامُهُ مِسْكٌ ۚ وَفِي ذَٰلِكَ فَلْيَتَنَافَسِ الْمُتَنَافِسُونَ
english translation text:
whose seal is musk—for such let the viers vie—
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

and whose seasoning is from Tasneem,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

a spring where those brought near [to Allah] drink.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ أَجْرَمُوا كَانُوا مِنَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا يَضْحَكُونَ
english translation text:
Indeed the guilty used to laugh at the faithful,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

and when they passed them by they would wink at each other,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: وَإِذَا انقَلَبُوا إِلَىٰ أَهْلِهِمُ انقَلَبُوا فَكِهِينَ
english translation text:
and when they returned to their folks they would return amused,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: وَإِذَا رَأَوْهُمْ قَالُوا إِنَّ هَٰؤُلَاءِ لَضَالُّونَ
english translation text:
and when they saw them they would say, ‘Indeed those are the astray!’
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

Though they were not sent to watch over them.
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: فَالْيَوْمَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا مِنَ الْكُفَّارِ يَضْحَكُونَ
english translation text:
So today the faithful will laugh at the faithless,
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

observing from their couches:
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding

arabic text: هَلْ ثُوِّبَ الْكُفَّارُ مَا كَانُوا يَفْعَلُونَ
english translation text:
Have the faithless been requited for what they used to do?
Al Mutaffifin – The Defrauding
